title: helichrysum dockeri
intro: Helichrysum dockeri, also known as the Swamp Paperflower, is a plant species in the sunflower family native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant's health benefits are said to include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and skin health. Helichrysum dockeri is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, and is also used in aromatherapy due to its calming and relaxing properties.
